llm_response:
# Resignation Letter

Please accept this email as formal notification of my decision to resign from my position as [Your Job Title], effective [Last Working Date]. After careful consideration, I have made the difficult choice to resign from my current role to pursue a new chapter in my professional life. This was not an easy decision to make, but I believe it is the right step for my future development.

The primary reasons for my decision to resign include a desire for greater career growth opportunities that align more closely with my long-term professional goals, as well as certain personal circumstances that require my full attention. While I have valued my time here, I feel that resigning now will allow me to focus on these new priorities without distraction. I am grateful for the skills I have gained, and I want to thank you for the opportunity to work under your leadership and contribute to the team's success.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition and will do everything possible to assist during this period. To facilitate this process, I propose the following key points for our transition plan:
*   Completing all pending projects and documenting current workflows before my departure.
*   Training a designated colleague to take over my primary responsibilities.
*   Returning all company property and accessing files to ensure no data is lost.
*   Thank you for the opportunity to be part of such a dynamic organization, and I hope we can stay in touch in the future.
